nasb.text: The second choir proceeded to the left, while I followed them with half of the people on the wall, above the Tower of Furnaces, to the Broad Wall,

esv.text: The other choir of those who gave thanks went to the north, and I followed them with half of the people, on the wall, above the Tower of the Ovens, to the Broad Wall,

cnv.text: 第二隊頌讚的人往左邊行，我和一半的人民跟著他們，在城牆上過了爐樓，直走到寬牆，

ccb.text: 第二队称颂的歌乐手向左走，我和半数的民众在城墙上跟着他们，经过炉楼一直走到宽墙，
